nl: L17 Theorem 1: The class of additive feature attribution methods corresponds exactly to additive games. Shapley values are unique satisfying Local Accuracy, Missingness, Consistency
formal: Φ 满足 LA ∧ Missingness ∧ Consistency ⇔ Φ = Shapley(AS-SHAP-CHARFN)

process_meta.[AH-HA]: L17 uniqueness 是循环论证 —— 'additive' 已预设 'SHAP-like'
process_meta.[HUNCH]: Impossibility 5.1 与 L17 Theorem 1 不矛盾 —— L17 Theorem 1 在 f̂=f 假设下, 5.1 在 f̂≠f 假设下
